violations.text: Tomato cucumber salad was observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC disposed of item. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2025
The non-food contact surfaces between cooking equipment have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025
The floor in the kitchen area is in poor repair (exposed cement - needs resealing). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2026

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the food storage shelving area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. PIC relocated items and talked with staff. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/23/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. PIC replaced. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2025

The following food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. - can opener - slicer The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC placed can opener in 3 bay sink and took deli slicer out of service to be washed and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2025

Deli meat was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. PIC discarded. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. PIC provided invoice that item was ordered. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: - plate warmer - sides of cooking appliances - can opener base - mixer Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025
The floor in the kitchen area is in poor repair (exposed cement - needs resealing). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2026
The furnace in the food storage area is in poor repair (exposed insulation). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. PIC refilled. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025

The following food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils were observed with an accumulation of food and debris: - can opener, - ice machine, - blender, - mixer attachments, - cooking utensils, - knives. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC washed/sanitized equipment and took ice machine out of service to be washed and sanitized. PIC disposed of ice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025

Various items were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025

The concentration of the sanitizer solution for the wet wiping cloths was 100 parts per million (ppm). The required concentration for quat sanitizer is 200-400 ppm. PIC replenished bucket. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025

Inspector observed plastic cup was observed being used as scoop in containers of dry ingredient (oats) AND scoop handle in contact with food (flour). Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025
Single service items were observed stored on the floor in the storage closet. Single service items must be stored at least 6 inches off the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025

The non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: - plate warmer (inside), - shelf under steam table, - cooking appliances, - ice cream freezer, - blender base, - food processor base, - can opener base, - mixer, - food storage contain (old label residue). New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025
The floor in the kitchen area is in poor repair (exposed cement - needs resealing). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2026

Sausages observed held at 108 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Sausages were reheated. Discussed filling hot wells with more water, and using deeper pans on steam table. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2024

There was no evidence that employees are required to report to the person in charge information about their health (illnesses, symptoms) as they relate to diseases that are transmissible through food. English Employee Illness Reporting Agreement Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2024
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. English Responding to Vomiting and Diarrhea Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, and utensils in the clean utensil storage bins) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. All items are to be cleaned and sanitized before use. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2024

Eggs observed held at 58 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2024

Ham was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2024
Tuna salad observed marked with a date exceeding 7 days. Disposed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2024

Thermometers are lacking in the prep refrigeration unit. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2024

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the grill table, prep unit, utensil bin, and chest freezer, have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2024
Dumpster area has an accumulation of litter, leaf litter, and unused items. New Violation. Correct By: 12/06/2024
The ceiling vent above the 3 bay sink has an accumulation of dust and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2024

The floor in the walk in cooler has an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/09/2024

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of soil residue and biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 11/16/2023
Hot dogs observed marked with a date exceeding 7 days. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/16/2023

The slicer was not in good repair, with the dial cracked and broken, and a metal panel hanging loose. Slicer was taken out of service to be refurbished or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 11/16/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: grill cart beneath grill prep unit knife rack mixer storage shelf near dishwasher The ice cream chest freezer has an accumulation of debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/16/2023

The ansul system pipes, and the panels beneath the hood have an accumulation of grease and debris. Ceiling light covers have an accumulation of dust, debris, and dead insects. An accumulation of dust was observed in the air duct above the 3 bay sink. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2023
